title: Temporal TypeScript subset equivalence contract
not_required_for_parity: incidental internal timing differences that do not change the semantic outcome
same_replay_outcome_definition: A replayed history must reach the same semantic terminal class and deterministic workflow-visible state for the supported subset.
same_failure_shape_definition: Failures must remain in the same semantic class and workflow-visible propagation point even when Fabrik uses different internal diagnostics.
